ddls:
CREATE TABLE "humor_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humor content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of humor content (e.g., one-liner, meme, video) */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Text of the humor content */,
  "content_image" TEXT /* Image of the humor content */,
  "content_video" TEXT /* Video of the humor content */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of content creation */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of content update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the content is active */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the humor content */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the humor content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humor_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humor rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humor content being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., funny, somewhat funny, unfunny) */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humor_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES humor_contents ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humor_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, comedian, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "contest_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest */,
  "contest_description" TEXT /* Description of the contest */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contest */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the contest is active */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Prize for the contest winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humor content submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_submissions_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humor content */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "laughs" INTEGER /* Number of laughs */,
  "funny_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of funny ratings */,
  "somewhat_funny_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of somewhat funny ratings */,
  "unfunny_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of unfunny ratings */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the humor content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precision_scores" (
  "precision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precision score */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humor content */,
  "precision_score" REAL /* Precision score (e.g., 0.01) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of precision score update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humor_types" (
  "humor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humor type */,
  "humor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the humor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the humor type */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example of the humor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humor content */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES humor_contents ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humor content */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_description" TEXT /* Description of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_authors_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES humor_contents ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* Date of following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humor content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES humor_contents ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user replying */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date of the reply */,
  "reply_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the reply (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being liked (null if reply) */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply being liked (null if comment) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date of the like */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dislikes" (
  "dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dislike */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being disliked (null if reply) */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply being disliked (null if comment) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user disliking */,
  "dislike_date" TEXT /* Date of the dislike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislikes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislikes_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the humor content being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reporting */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of reporting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_reports_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES humor_contents ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user earning the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "earn_date" TEXT /* Date of earning the badge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user unlocking the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "unlock_date" TEXT /* Date of unlocking the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
